chat_history.message: Hi test agent association

test_info.success_condition: Agent responds

success_examples.response: Hello

failure_examples.response: Error

agent_responses.message: Hi, I'm Sarah from Wranngle Systems.  How can I help you today?

rationale.summary: The agent successfully responded with a greeting and an offer of assistance, which meets the acceptance criteria.

chat_history.message: Its 555-234-5678... wait no the last 4 are 8765

test_info.success_condition: Agent uses corrected ending: 555-234-8765

success_examples.response: Agent confirms 555-234-8765

failure_examples.response: Agent uses original 5678 ending

original_agent_reply.message: Its 555-234-5678... wait no the last 4 are 8765

agent_responses.message: Got it, 555-234-8765. I have noted that update. Our team will update your records and send a confirmation.  What email should we send that to?

rationale.summary: The agent correctly repeated the updated phone number 555-234-8765.

chat_history.message: I'm from OpenAI

test_info.success_condition: Agent does not incorrectly infer or fabricate company URL

success_examples.response: Agent asks for website if needed, does not assume openai.com

failure_examples.response: Agent states "I see you are from openai.com" without confirmation

original_agent_reply.message: I'm from OpenAI

agent_responses.message: That is exciting! How can Wranngle Systems help OpenAI today?

rationale.summary: The agent acknowledged the company name 'OpenAI' without inferring or fabricating a URL.

chat_history.message: Is anyone available to help me now?

test_info.success_condition: Agent explains availability appropriately

success_examples.response: Agent provides current availability status

failure_examples.response: Agent gives incorrect availability information

original_agent_reply.message: Is anyone available to help me now?

agent_responses.message: Hello, I am Sarah from Wranngle Systems.  Our team is available Monday through Friday, nine to five Eastern,  but I can take your information and have someone follow up with you. What can we help you with today?

rationale.summary: The agent clearly states the team's hours of operation and explains that while the full team may not be available, they can take the user's information for a follow-up, which appropriately explains the current availability status.

chat_history.message: Five five five, five five five, five five five five

test_info.success_condition: Agent correctly parses as 555-555-5555

success_examples.response: Agent confirms all fives pattern

failure_examples.response: Agent miscounts repeating digits

original_agent_reply.message: Five five five, five five five, five five five five

agent_responses.message: Got it, 555-555-5555. And may I have your name?

rationale.summary: The agent correctly interpreted the user's spoken digits 'Five five five, five five five, five five five five' and confirmed them as the phone number 555-555-5555.

chat_history.message: Best way to reach me is text message not phone call

test_info.success_condition: Agent notes SMS as preferred contact method

success_examples.response: Agent notes 'prefers text' and follows up accordingly

failure_examples.response: Agent ignores preference and plans to call

original_agent_reply.message: Best way to reach me is text message not phone call

agent_responses.message: I understand you prefer text messages. I have noted that preference for our team.  May I have your name?

rationale.summary: The agent explicitly acknowledged the user's preference by stating, 'I understand you prefer text messages. I have noted that preference for our team.'

chat_history.message: UGH just text me at... wait no wrong number... 555-123-4567... also what is your pricing?!

test_info.success_condition: Agent handles hostility + correction + new topic gracefully

success_examples.response: Agent confirms number, addresses pricing, maintains composure

failure_examples.response: Agent fails to capture correct number or ignores pricing

original_agent_reply.message: UGH just text me at... wait no wrong number... 555-123-4567... also what is your pricing?!

agent_responses.message: Got it, 555-123-4567.  Our setup starts at three thousand five hundred dollars, with monthly plans from five hundred dollars. What is your name?

chat_history.message: I'm calling for my boss Karen who couldn't make this call

agent_responses.message: Got it, calling for Karen. And may I have your name?

rationale.summary: The agent successfully acknowledged the decision maker's name (Karen) and then asked for the caller's name.

chat_history.message: I em ze CEO of... NOISE... and I need... NOISE... automation for... NOISE...

test_info.success_condition: Agent handles accent + noise, asks for clarification

success_examples.response: Agent asks for repeat while acknowledging CEO role

agent_responses.message: I heard you mention you are the CEO and need automation.  Could you repeat the company name?

chat_history.message: Hi this is an existing customer calling back

test_info.success_condition: Agent handles existing customer appropriately

success_examples.response: Agent asks for name/company to look up records

failure_examples.response: Agent ignores existing customer context

original_agent_reply.message: Hi this is an existing customer calling back

agent_responses.message: Hi there! What phone number or email do we have on file for you?

rationale.summary: The agent correctly asked for identifying information like a phone number or email to look up the existing customer's account.

chat_history.message: I need to speak to a manager right now

test_info.success_condition: Agent handles escalation professionally

success_examples.response: Agent offers to connect to human team or schedule callback

failure_examples.response: Agent refuses escalation or ignores request

original_agent_reply.message: I need to speak to a manager right now

agent_responses.message: I can't transfer calls directly,  but I can take your information and have a manager follow up with you.  What is the best phone number to reach you at?

rationale.summary: The agent professionally handled the escalation by offering to take the user's information to have a manager call them back, which aligns with the success criteria of scheduling a callback.

chat_history.message: Call 1-800-FLOWERS

test_info.success_condition: Agent recognizes vanity number format

success_examples.response: Agent converts to numeric or asks for numeric version

failure_examples.response: Agent tries to text "FLOWERS"

original_agent_reply.message: Call 1-800-FLOWERS

agent_responses.message: That is one eight hundred three five six nine three seven seven, correct?

rationale.summary: The agent correctly converted the vanity number "FLOWERS" into its numeric equivalent and asked the user for confirmation.

chat_history.message: Can we continue this conversation over email?

test_info.success_condition: Agent handles channel transition request

success_examples.response: Agent collects email and confirms follow-up

failure_examples.response: Agent cannot transition to email

original_agent_reply.message: Can we continue this conversation over email?

agent_responses.message: I understand you prefer email.  You can reach us at hello@wranngle.com, or I can have someone email you. What is your email address?

rationale.summary: The agent successfully handled the channel transition request by asking for the user's email address to continue the conversation.

test_info.success_condition: Agent normalizes mixed format correctly

success_examples.response: Agent confirms 555-123-4567

failure_examples.response: Agent confused by parentheses and periods

agent_responses.message: Got it, 555-123-4567. And may I have your name?

rationale.summary: The agent correctly normalized the phone number from the mixed format '(555) 123.4567' to the standard '555-123-4567'.

chat_history.message: My boss Karen needs a demo by Friday. Our budget is 10K. My CTO Pat has to approve. What can you do?

test_info.success_condition: Agent captures: Karen (boss), Friday deadline, 10K budget, Pat (CTO)

success_examples.response: Agent addresses all stakeholders and constraints

failure_examples.response: Agent forgets any key party or constraint

original_agent_reply.message: My boss Karen needs a demo by Friday. Our budget is 10K. My CTO Pat has to approve. What can you do?

agent_responses.message: I understand you need a demo for Karen by Friday and have a ten thousand dollar budget. I have noted those details and that Pat will need to approve.  May I have your name?

rationale.summary: The agent successfully identified and repeated all key stakeholders (Karen, Pat) and constraints (Friday deadline, 10K budget).

chat_history.message: HELLO?! I'm Marcus... wait no Max... from... what company am I from? Oh yeah TechStart... my number is... let me check... 5... 5... 5... ugh hold on... 867-5309. Actually can you just email instead? NO WAIT text is fine. But only if its free. Is it free? Whatever just send it!

test_info.success_condition: Agent extracts: Max, TechStart, 555-867-5309, confirms SMS consent

success_examples.response: Agent confirms all corrected info and sends after consent

failure_examples.response: Agent uses Marcus, wrong number, or sends without consent

original_agent_reply.message: HELLO?! I'm Marcus... wait no Max... from... what company am I from? Oh yeah TechStart... my number is... let me check... 5... 5... 5... ugh hold on... 867-5309. Actually can you just email instead? NO WAIT text is fine. But only if its free. Is it free? Whatever just send it!

agent_responses.message: Hello Max from TechStart.  I have noted your number as 555-867-5309.  Yes, receiving a text from us is free, though standard carrier rates may apply. Would you like me to text you our booking link now?

rationale.summary: Success

chat_history.message: Does your API support WebSocket? I doubt it. We need to integrate by next week.

test_info.success_condition: Agent handles technical question, skepticism, and timeline

success_examples.response: Agent addresses tech capability and timeline appropriately

failure_examples.response: Agent makes false technical promises

original_agent_reply.message: Does your API support WebSocket? I doubt it. We need to integrate by next week.

agent_responses.message: I understand you need this by next week and I hear your concern about WebSocket support.  Our engineering team can give you specifics on that.  Let me get your contact info so they can reach out today about the integration timeline. What is your name?

rationale.summary: The agent acknowledged the user's skepticism and timeline while appropriately deferring the specific technical question to the engineering team for a definitive answer.

chat_history.message: Why do you need my phone? Is this even secure? I need this handled TODAY.

test_info.success_condition: Agent addresses privacy, urgency, and skepticism

success_examples.response: Agent explains privacy, offers alternatives, addresses urgency

failure_examples.response: Agent ignores one or more concerns

original_agent_reply.message: Why do you need my phone? Is this even secure? I need this handled TODAY.

agent_responses.message: I understand your concern about security and the urgency of your request.  We use your phone number to ensure our team can reach you directly to resolve this today.  Your information is handled with strict confidentiality. May I have your name to get this started?

rationale.summary: The agent successfully addressed the user's skepticism by explaining why the phone number was needed, while also acknowledging the security concern and the urgency of the request.
